---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the repo, workflow, or bot configuration surface
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem or opportunity

What pain point or missed opportunity are you trying to address?

## Proposed change

Describe the idea clearly.

## Why this helps

Explain the benefit for maintainability, setup, safety, or trading workflow.

## Scope

- [ ] Documentation only
- [ ] Repo / GitHub workflow
- [ ] Shared engine
- [ ] Forex wrapper template
- [ ] NAS100 template
- [ ] Other

## Safety considerations

If this affects trading behavior or risk controls, explain the expected impact.

## Additional context

Links, screenshots, examples, or references.
